hero.headline: A map of ideas for future-ready learning.
hero.subheading: Concept Atlas transforms complex ideas about transformation, systems, culture, and innovation into accessible learning tools for classrooms, creative practice, and institutional growth.

intro.heading: Where big ideas become usable.
intro.body: Complex thinking should not be locked away in technical language. Concept Atlas is designed to make powerful ideas visible, teachable, and practical so that learners, educators, and partners can apply them in ways that matter to real communities.
intro.cta: Use These Ideas in Learning and Practice
